title: agrostis gigantea var. ramosa
intro: Agrostis gigantea var. ramosa, commonly known as red top, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of red top grass include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of red top grass can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, fever, and skin conditions.
